query: We are seeking a retail operations leader to oversee store performance, team development, and day-to-day execution in a fast-paced specialty or big-box environment. The ideal candidate will have deep experience hiring, training, coaching, and supervising associates while driving strong customer service and consistent sales growth. This role will be responsible for managing profit and loss, improving operational processes, and partnering with leadership to achieve company goals. Strong interpersonal skills, the ability to resolve conflicts, and a proven track record of turning around underperforming locations are essential. Experience in automotive retail or another high-volume sales environment is a plus.

We are hiring an inside sales and customer service associate to support appointment scheduling, order processing, and account follow-up in a busy office environment. The right candidate will be comfortable juggling multiple priorities, maintaining accurate records, and communicating clearly with customers and internal teams. This position requires strong computer skills, attention to detail, and the ability to verify product or service information accurately. Prior experience handling invoices, filing, and coordinating sales activity is highly valued. A pleasant demeanor and a dependable work style are important for success in this role.

Our organization is looking for an information technology supervisor to lead a small team supporting enterprise hardware, communications equipment, and end-user systems. The role includes troubleshooting, installing, and maintaining IT equipment while ensuring inventory accountability and operational readiness. The ideal candidate will have experience training personnel, creating technical documentation, and coordinating projects in a secure environment. Familiarity with Microsoft tools such as Excel, Project, Visio, and SharePoint is preferred, along with a current security clearance or the ability to obtain one. Military or mission-critical IT support experience would be a strong advantage.

We are seeking a detail-oriented sales and bookkeeping professional to support invoicing, accounts receivable, customer follow-up, and administrative operations. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in clerical work, financial processing, and customer relations in a fast-paced environment. Responsibilities include matching and coding invoices, resolving billing issues, and helping reduce outstanding receivables through effective follow-up and reporting. Experience with SAP, QuickBooks, Microsoft Office, and other business systems is highly desirable. Prior exposure to insurance sales or service administration would be a plus.

A hospitality finance team is seeking an assistant director of finance to support budgeting, forecasting, reconciliations, and month-end close activities across multiple properties. The successful candidate will partner with hotel general managers and ownership groups to review performance, prepare annual budgets, and respond to financial reporting questions. This role requires experience with payroll journal validation, month-end analysis, and coordination with corporate finance stakeholders. Strong knowledge of Hyperion, Oracle, and hotel accounting processes is preferred. A CPA or equivalent finance background with leadership experience in a multi-property environment is ideal.

We are looking for a business development executive to expand enterprise market share through strategic prospecting, campaign collaboration, and consultative selling. The ideal candidate will manage a sales pipeline, work closely with marketing and internal stakeholders, and use CRM tools to track leads and opportunities. This position requires a strong record of meeting growth targets, building client relationships, and presenting tailored solutions to enterprise customers. Experience with go-to-market strategy, account planning, and competitive market analysis is important. Candidates with a background in HR technology or software sales are especially encouraged to apply.

Our company is seeking a business development executive to own a full sales cycle and generate new revenue through strategic territory management and client outreach. The successful candidate will build relationships with prospects, coordinate with subject matter experts, and close complex deals in a competitive environment. This role requires strong negotiation skills, quota attainment, and the ability to analyze sales performance and market opportunities. Experience managing accounts, developing business plans, and working independently to hit ambitious targets is essential. A consultative sales approach and proven networking ability will help the right candidate succeed.

We are hiring a manager for information technology and building automation systems to lead infrastructure, server, and automation projects across a large facility or campus. The role involves managing project lifecycles, supporting network and server environments, and coordinating upgrades for building automation and related systems. The ideal candidate will have strong technical knowledge, leadership experience, and the ability to produce clear documentation and support users effectively. A current PMP or CISM certification is preferred, along with experience in enterprise platforms and both Mac and PC environments. This position is well suited for someone who can balance hands-on technical work with team leadership and project planning.

A manufacturing plant is looking for an engineering specialist to support equipment installations, controls troubleshooting, and robotic system maintenance. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience with PLC platforms, industrial robotics, and electrical/mechanical repair in a high-voltage production environment. Responsibilities include diagnosing failures, reading technical schematics, performing preventative maintenance, and assisting with equipment upgrades. Experience with Allen-Bradley PLCs, Fanuc robots, and ABB robots is highly desirable. Minor fabrication and welding skills are a plus for this role.

We are seeking an information technology manager to oversee systems administration, help desk operations, web and database development, and technology planning. The successful candidate will manage technical staff or vendor support while also contributing to application design, server maintenance, and disaster recovery initiatives. This role requires experience with Active Directory, SQL, Windows Server, SharePoint, and enterprise database environments. Strong project management skills and the ability to gather requirements, document processes, and support users across the organization are essential. Experience with business intelligence tools, SDLC practices, and cross-functional leadership is highly valued.

Our team is seeking an information technology specialist to provide end-user support, hardware and software installation, and systems optimization for a growing organization. The ideal candidate will bring more than a decade of technical support experience and a strong ability to troubleshoot issues, improve collaboration tools, and strengthen security practices. This role includes assisting with workstation setups, updating systems, and supporting operations through effective problem solving and project coordination. Candidates should be comfortable working independently, communicating clearly with users, and adapting to changing technical needs. Operations analysis or systems support experience is a plus.

We are looking for an information technology specialist to deliver high-quality customer support and technical assistance in a fast-paced service environment. The successful candidate will have extensive experience working with users, solving problems under pressure, and communicating clearly with both customers and coworkers. Responsibilities include diagnosing technical issues, coordinating service requests, and ensuring reliable support for end users across the organization. Strong interpersonal skills, sound judgment, and the ability to work effectively with diverse groups are essential. Candidates with experience in both customer service and IT support will be especially well matched to this position.
